name: fantastic-py-ts-itest
description: Python<->TS cross-runtime integration tests: boot a real python `fantastic` host and drive the TS frontend kernel in a real browser over the bridge. Node-driven sibling of the pytest bridge suite in ../. Zero deps — node's built-in test runner + native TS type-stripping; tests import the frontend kernel from ../../ts/src and the host harness from ./_host.ts.
